message:
feat(frankenterm-core): incremental patch API with dirty tracking (bd-lff4p.1.8)

Production-ready incremental change tracking for both WebGPU and native
present paths:

- DirtyTracker: per-row boolean flags + per-row dirty spans with
  configurable merge gap for sub-linear diff cost
- GridDiff: full diff and dirty-hinted diff (skips clean rows, only
  checks dirty spans within changed rows)
- ChangeRun: contiguous horizontal spans for cursor-based ANSI output
- Patch: enhanced with run coalescing (runs/runs_into), density metric,
  reusable diff_into, stable row-major ordering guarantee
- DirtySpan: half-open column ranges with merge/coalesce

132 tests, clippy clean, fmt clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
